g.text: Match Monitor Group Betting - Association Detection Logic

SELECT CustID1, CustID2, COUNT(*) as Cnt
Match A, Match B, Match C

For each customer, record which method(s)
Note: Only customers with GroupID returned
Only customers in groups are considered fraud
Identify groups of customers betting together (fraud detection)
1. âœ“ Device Detection - Same device ID
2. âœ“ AI Detection - ML pattern matching
3. âœ“ IP Detection - Same IP address
4. âœ“ 3 Matches Last 7 Days - Frequent co-betting
5. âœ“ IP Last 3 Days - Recent IP matching
Each sport can enable/disable criteria independently
Example: Soccer uses all 5, Basketball only Device+IP
- API parameters control which sports use which criteria
- Easy to adjust per sport without code changes
- Can add new criteria without breaking existing
- Single SP call for all detections
